raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XXXX  made an electronic payment of {$7000.00} to my Macys American Express account on XX/XX/2023. The payment was processed by American Express on XX/XX/2023. Macys continues to state the electronic transfer was intercepted by a third party, who verbally they identify to be American Express, providing no written documentation of such claim. Macys has failed to recover the funds from American Express and to apply those funds to my account. In addition, Macys withdrew, via the automated payment process, {$1200.00} from my checking account totaling two payments in one transaction without my knowledge or consent. As a result I discontinued the payments, filled complaints disputing the full balance of the Macys account. I have not made any subsequent payments and have continued to dispute the balance. Currently, Macys is reporting me as delinquent in this account, having sent information to the credit bureaus significantly reducing my Credit/FICO scores causing damage to my personal and business credit reputation, preventing me from functioning credibly. I have continued to send information from my bank to Macys showing payment. My XXXX XXXX  representative has called, emailed proof of transaction but with no resolve.
